content: FFN fusion is implemented in gen_fused_ffn_mlmodelc() in compiler.py
FFN fusion uses NeuralNetworkBuilder compiled via xcrun, patching ReLU to GELU mode 19
Fused conv+GELU+conv compiles to 1 ANE dispatch, down from 2 dispatches plus CPU GELU
QKV fusion combines c_attn weight [768 to 2304] as a single conv with output split on CPU
GPT-2 fusion reduced dispatches from 73 to 37 per token
GPT-2 fused throughput is 135.9 +/- 3.0 tok/s, up from 28.9 tok/s (4.7x speedup)
GPT-2 fusion kill test passed 11/11 and 15/15 tokens matching PyTorch on two prompts
Llama SiLU on ANE is easy via activation mode 25
Llama SwiGLU fusion is medium difficulty due to elementwise MUL between two conv streams
Llama large dims are medium difficulty because 16.8M params exceeds aned 1.3M compilation limit
Llama GQA, RoPE, RMSNorm, and no-bias are all easy for ANE
At 37 dispatches GPT-2 runs at 7.4ms per token, which is 200us per dispatch round-trip
200us per dispatch is 2.2x the bare ANE dispatch floor of 93us
GPT-2 117M has 768 hidden dim and 3072 FFN dim
At GPT-2 dimensions, ANE compute per fused op is near-zero and CPU overhead collapse is the main speedup factor
GPT-2 fusion correctness is verified: fusion does not break output
